## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] chore — config / tooling
- [ ] refactor — code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
- [ ] style — formatting, no logic change
- [ ] docs — documentation only

## Screenshots / Recordings

<!-- For UI changes, include before/after screenshots or a short clip -->

## Test Plan

<!-- How did you verify this works? What should reviewers check? -->

-

## Checklist

- [ ] Linked to relevant issue/ticket
- [ ] `pnpm lint`, `pnpm type-check`, and `pnpm build` pass locally
- [ ] Self-reviewed the diff
- [ ] No `any` types / untyped props introduced
